title: Senators Ask Hegseth to Fully Account for U.S. Troops Killed or Wounded in Iran
summary_full: The 12 Democratic senators on the Armed Services Committee said Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s department had not provided “timely and comprehensive” reporting on casualties during the war.
summary_public: The 12 Democratic senators on the Armed Services Committee said Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s department had not provided “timely and comprehensive” reporting on casualties during the war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Troops Killed or Wounded in Iran
